name_en: Top-tier replica M81554 Cross-grain Green The BRAZZA wallet is crafted from Taïga leather, highlighting delicate textures with understated colors. It features a compartment for bills and receipts, as well as a coin pocket and card slots. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
